{{Quote|Bnach is an Imperial prison planet. No one goes there—|[[Drake Paulsen]]|<ref name="Bitter">{{JournalCite|5|A Bitter Winter}}</ref>}}
'''Bnach''' was a hot, desolate [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that housed an global [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] penal camp, and was renowned for its deadly rock quarries. Prisoners forced to labor in these quarries were said to survive no more than a year.<ref name="PDS" />

Aging [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Toob Ancher]], while suffering from the deleterious mental effects of [[Bitter Winter]], claimed to [[Drake Paulsen]] that he and Drake's father [[Kaine Paulsen|Kaine]] had a [[Lightfight|shootout]] with [[Sector Police]] on Bnach, though Drake was quick to point out that Bnach was an Imperial prison where no one went.<ref name="Bitter" />

[[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Thistleborn]] was sentenced to three years of hard labor on the world by the [[Church of the Dark Side|Prophets of the Dark Side]].<ref name="PDS" />
